reviews.name: places/ChIJMZSqiblLrkwRuSNKXHeYyUg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsaGVDMDVURUpQU0VOVVlreE5lVGg1UkZaemNWRRAB
reviews.text: Anyone wondering if HRT is right for you should go see Liz! She took the time to review my history and explain the pros and cons! She is easy to communicate with outside of the office too! I’m so glad I took the steps to meet with her!

reviews.name: places/ChIJMZSqiblLrkwRuSNKXHeYyUg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGbk0weFZNMDk2WVdsdGNITlhSVXhhYWxWT1ZYYxAB
reviews.text: I recently became a patient of Elizabeth Duke at “Integrated Wellness”. Liz is treating me for Arthritis. She is pleasant and considerate, and appreciates my concerns. She is very knowledgeable and spends the time I need to answer my questions and explaining my treatment. She is readily accessible and I’m pleased to give her 5 ⭐️

reviews.name: places/ChIJMZSqiblLrkwRuSNKXHeYyUg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tOTmR6VkdRekp5WkRsd2VGOWZlVXhmU2tGMVVIYxAB
reviews.text: My experience is lengthy. I’ve been receiving treatments and advice from Ms Duke for nearly 10 years and have never been disappointed with the results.  She listens and responds in good time.  I have every confidence in her advice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJMZSqiblLrkwRuSNKXHeYyUg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGMlNIUnFObTFFU0hKbVRHSTFlRlJ6TkdSd01uYxAB
reviews.text: Elizabeth was very professional, knowledgeable and she really cared what we had to say!  I would recommend her to any man or woman for their care, whether it be HRT, sick visits, wound care or any of the many services she can provide to her patients! I will be using her services for a very long time to come!  Thank you Elizabeth Duke!

reviews.name: places/ChIJMZSqiblLrkwRuSNKXHeYyUg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvczk2SUt3EAE
reviews.text:
I was referred to Elizabeth Duke, over a year ago for treatment for severe osteoporosis. I was immediately impressed by how knowledgeable she is regarding osteoporosis, its possible complications and its treatment. She advised me very thoroughly about my options regarding medication and therapies and what she felt may work best for me. She was very clear regarding necessary movement and dangerous exertion, about appropriate exercises for my condition and ones to avoid.
Elizabeth’s expertise is enhanced by her down to earth, comforting approach, her sense of humor, and her unfailing positivity. Never have I felt rushed during an appointment. I feel that Elizabeth goes out of her way to make sure that all my concerns and questions are addressed. In fact, she has urged me to contact her at any time should the need arise.
My most recent visit with her has been in her new office space, in Bangor, happily much more convenient for me. Her previous office was an hour from my home, but I have consistently felt confident that I am receiving the best possible treatment under her care that I never considered trying to find someone nearer. I highly recommend Elizabeth Duke NP.

reviews.name: places/ChIJr-iXgmVtrkwRvAS_2FHCEY8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNEx2dmRBEAE
reviews.text: Melissa is absolutely incredible! I have been seeing her for almost a year now and feel significantly better. She takes the time to listen to your symptoms and gives great feedback and recommendations. She is very thorough and knowledgeable in the field. I highly recommend her!

reviews.name: places/ChIJr-iXgmVtrkwRvAS_2FHCEY8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXN0ktanhnRRAB
reviews.text:
Melissa is the most caring and professional practitioner that I have ever worked with.  It is refreshing to have a health professional that asks the right questions and also knows how to listen.

Many doctors will send you for labs, but she is the first person to really go over what it all means. We are lucky to have her in the Belfast area!

reviews.name: places/ChIJr-iXgmVtrkwRvAS_2FHCEY8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NThYUWd3RRAB
reviews.text: Melissa is GREAT! She actually listens to my symptoms and concerns instead of just reading the blood test numbers. She explains everything and offers reading material to help me understand what's going on with my body (instead of just telling me what to do and pushing me out the virtual door). I feel better than I have in a long time. I wish I'd consulted her years ago!

reviews.name: places/ChIJr-iXgmVtrkwRvAS_2FHCEY8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxZzZDMVJnEAE
reviews.text: Melissa Mathurin is a highly knowledgeable and experienced medical professional, who’s passion is Women’s Health.  She evaluates each patient on an individual basis, and then formulates a finely tailored treatment plan.  She is also dedicated to helping her patients achieve their goals for living a healthy lifestyle and maintaining their ideal weight, as desired.  She’s helped me look and feel so much better!!!  I recommend scheduling a consult ASAP!

reviews.name: places/ChIJr-iXgmVtrkwRvAS_2FHCEY8/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdE1mOW9nRRAB
reviews.text: Working with Melissa has been absolutely life-changing. In a matter of weeks, the quality of my life improved by 1000%.  After beginning care with Melissa, my hot flashes have disappeared and I consistently sleep through the night with no interruptions - which is something I hadn't done for years.  I had felt such hopelessness before meeting Melissa, and now I feel like my happy, motivated self again.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ78rlsrSDskwRoGUjcdHa0hg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pBeFpVdGtXbUpVYWpkT1MyVlNORVozUjJZNWNsRRAB
reviews.text:
I’ve had a fantastic experience at TruForm Longevity. From the moment you walk in, the environment is welcoming, professional, and very well run. The clinic is clean, modern, and the staff makes you feel comfortable right away.

The approach at TruForm Longevity feels thoughtful and personalized rather than one-size-fits-all. I left feeling informed, supported, and excited about my health plan.

Highly recommend TruForm Longevity to anyone looking for a clinic that genuinely focuses on long-term health and wellness. Great team and great experience overall! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.name: places/ChIJ78rlsrSDskwRoGUjcdHa0hg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxc2FIZHNlR2RWWDBkS0xYcHdObGxUTlRWWFJVRRAB
reviews.text:
I started going to TrueForm Longevity not really knowing what to expect, but it’s honestly been such a great experience. From the moment I walked in, everyone made me feel comfortable and welcome. The space is super clean, relaxing, and you can tell they really care about their clients.

As a girl who’s always trying to balance work, life, and taking care of myself, finding a place that focuses on wellness and longevity has been amazing. The staff took the time to explain everything and made sure I felt confident about the treatments I was getting. I never felt rushed or pressured, which I really appreciated.

I’ve already noticed improvements in how I feel—more energy, better recovery, and just overall feeling healthier. It’s become part of my self-care routine now.

If you’re looking for a place that truly focuses on helping you feel your best from the inside out, I definitely recommend TrueForm Longevity. 💫

reviews.name: places/ChIJ78rlsrSDskwRoGUjcdHa0hg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wSFVFTmxPWE5hWmxSVVlVeFFhekZKUjNwak4yYxAB
reviews.text:
Everyone in the office is so friendly and welcoming.
The moment I walked into the office I felt heard. Everyone is super knowledgeable and compassionate.
Listening to my fears and concerns and helping me understand how everything was working.
Highly recommend them!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ78rlsrSDskwRoGUjcdHa0hg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kYWMyeE1TMUF4VUZVeFJqa3RhRXgyWTFkdFpVRRAB
reviews.text: Pat and his team are amazing! They are all very friendly and professional.  They listen to all of my concerns and explain everything in detail, so I am never left wondering.  I highly recommend TruForm Longevity.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ78rlsrSDskwRoGUjcdHa0hg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaSmMwUlNRVlJrU0ZaSlNWRXlSM0ppTkVjd05uYxAB
reviews.text:
Patrick Fisher at TruForm Longevity Center was a huge help when I was struggling with fertility issues. He was quick to respond, quick to help, and clearly knows his stuff. With his guidance, I was able to get my numbers back into a healthy range.

The whole TruForm team was great to work with professional, supportive, and always on top of things. I felt well taken care of throughout the process. Definitely recommend Patrick and the team if you’re looking for knowledgeable and reliable care

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3V8OWe6bskwR5IQWukuXl0M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxbmNDMXpXREprWWt4TmRXNWxWSEEwVUY5TGQzYxAB
reviews.text:
I had a double mastectomy due to breast cancer in April 2024.  Since that day I have had several skin infections, necrosis of the skin twice and 3 different implants for reconstruction.  Eight surgeries later I decided it was time for a change.  Matt @ Age Management Center suggested BPC 157-TB4-MGF, in short, it’s a Peptide injection.  I started my injections in January 2026 and immediately noticed that some of my pains had diminished or were completely gone.  Especially my right Deltoid that has bothered me for years.  Just the other day I noticed that my skin is softer on my breast and stomach.  Then I realized that I did not get an infection or necrosis after my last surgery on 12/26/2025.  I owe all of this to the Peptide. The entire staff is a delight, from Kelli at the front desk to Ashley the MA to Jen and Rhonda in the medication room, just to name a few. If you have never used a Peptide now is the time to talk to a provider at Age Management Center.  I am positive you will be happy with the results.
Warmest Regards,
Vicki S
Windham, ME

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3V8OWe6bskwR5IQWukuXl0M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSTFpVcDFkamxSZFhGTFpHNVdjblpUTVZkRGVVRRAB
reviews.text: Absolutely Phenomenal!!! They perfectly tailor a plan that fits your needs. Their extremely knowledgeable doctors sit down with you and thoroughly explain your labs and any questions you have. I’ve been with them for 10 years and consider it one of the best moves I’ve ever made!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3V8OWe6bskwR5IQWukuXl0M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21JNU56UTBhMEZGYzNoM2FrTjFPWFV4UVhBNFkyYxAB
reviews.text: I have been working with Age Management and Anita Nicholson, who practices Integrative Functional Medicine with a focus on women’s health, longevity, and she is an expert in menopause care. Anita is the best health care provider I have ever had. She is exceptionally knowledgeable, deeply attentive, and truly invested in her patients. I have never felt better. Thank you, Anita, for guiding and supporting me on my wellness journey.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3V8OWe6bskwR5IQWukuXl0M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0a2VtWnBla3B4UVVGTGMwdEJSelJFZVZSVlRVRRAB
reviews.text:
I started on the weight loss program about a year and a half ago. I have lost over 75 pounds and become much healthier. I still have things to work on but the staff at the age management clinic is absolutely fantastic.
I cannot say enough about Anita, she is wonderful! She listens, she gives suggestions, and she helps you make a plan to meet all your goals. All the staff is amazing.! Ann Marie, Gail, Emily, and more! I would highly recommend the age management clinic to everyone!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ3V8OWe6bskwR5IQWukuXl0M/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taaVgwMUtUbEZGVjBSdVRtSnJWMnREYjI5R09GRRAB
reviews.text:
I am a perimenopause woman who has been looking for answers  for why I feel the way I feel for years! I finally found a place where I am listened to AND offered solutions!  I have been under the care of Christie Shepherd for a couple months now and I feel amazing. The amount of time she spent with me asking and answering questions made me feel so validated.
Try it! You won’t regret it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJX-XqvoSZskwRq6weeXPVBME/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25WSWJHOW9TME5HU0ZwSFlXTlZlVWhIV1ZVNE5uYxAB
reviews.text: I just started Tirezepatide a week ago here and it works like a charm. I instantly feel more full, my cravings are curbed, and I feel like my start out dose that Tasha recommended to me is perfect since I have never taken this before. I am excited to continue my weight loss journey as within the past years it’s been challenging. Mike has been super helpful with providing nutritional support and assistance that has added value to my weight loss goals! I highly recommend coming here to get the quality treatment and service every time. I already lost weight so far! Let’s see how far I go!

reviews.name: places/ChIJX-XqvoSZskwRq6weeXPVBME/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGaVEwVjFiVVExWHpKeVNqbG1kV2hVU1dodlFWRRAB
reviews.text:
I've being to Game Day Health since Mike Lowans opened the clinic about seven months ago, and I couldn't be more impressed. I went to high school with Mike Lowans and have always admired his dedication, discipline, and attention to detail-qualities that truly set the standard everything he does. He's created a clinic approachable and efficient.

From the moment I walked in, Mike Lowans personally greeted me at the door, immediately setting the tone for exceptional experience. He's been a mentor to me for years, and his passion, leadership, and genuine care are evident in every aspect of the clinic. The entire staff is incredibly welcoming and delivers top-tier customer service that makes you feel more like family than a patient.

One of the biggest highlights os the efficiency-receiving same-day lab results was absolutely mind -blowing. Within minutes, I had clear, accurate bloodwork results convenient, and truly impressive. I highly recommend Game Day Men's Health to anyone looking for outstanding care, professionalism, and an all-around exceptional experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJX-XqvoSZskwRq6weeXPVBME/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SNFpWOXJVaTFETVMxWFkyOXdlbUkyV1VsdllYYxAB
reviews.text: Highly recommend to any guys who want to invest in themselves. Amazing staff, made me feel super comfortable and well informed on first visit. I’ll be long time patient thanks Gameday!

reviews.name: places/ChIJX-XqvoSZskwRq6weeXPVBME/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSR09XTm5kRkZwVHpSek5ISklRMnhXWVROeE5VRRAB
reviews.text: So happy I decided to start my new health adventures with Gameday ! Everyone there was very knowledgeable and easy to talk to ! Thank you !

reviews.name: places/ChIJX-XqvoSZskwRq6weeXPVBME/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psc2FEUk5ibDlzVDJ0blZuaGlhMHh4VEY5dFFXYxAB
reviews.text: I started going to Game Day Heath about 6 weeks and so far it has been a game changer! Mike and his team at Game Day Health have given me the tools and knowledge I needed to become the best version of myself. I highly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJM57DhYqdskwRLuh0hj26YSI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWb05YSXllRkozYVRCYWJraG5UbDlmTlRkV1RXYxAB
reviews.text: Jjust completed my VO2 max assessment at Longevity Maine, achieving an impressive score of 56—comparable to those half my age! This cutting-edge team of medical experts is dedicated to redefining healthcare, empowering you to reach your peak potential and become the person you’ve always aspired to be.

reviews.name: places/ChIJM57DhYqdskwRLuh0hj26YSI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJaG8ySnFnRRAB
reviews.text: I just did my v02 max testing with Michael at Longevity Maine- eye opening and especially motivating to have my numbers in front of me. No more guessing and hoping my fitness is up to longevity standards. I now know exactly where I’m at and what I need to do with my fitness to improve my score into the elite category! Really excited to see how this new knowledge will motivate me to take my fitness to the next level!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM57DhYqdskwRLuh0hj26YSI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJMk9qLUF3EAE
reviews.text: I have known Michael for a long time and have trusted his fitness, nutrition and wellness advice for just as long. With Longevity Maine, such an important starting point for me was to do the VO2 max testing and learn more about what it measures and why it matters. Now I know where I stand compared to peers my age, and what types of exercise and activities would be most helpful to improving my VO2 max and corresponding longevity. He explained what I should focus on, what kinds of complementary activities would be good based on my current habits and lifestyle. Game changer.

reviews.name: places/ChIJM57DhYqdskwRLuh0hj26YSI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRcHZMZ2RREAE
reviews.text:
I had a lucky opportunity to have a health evaluation with Longevity Maine.  I believe it is the future of preventative medicine and am lucky to have been able to experience this cutting edge technology through the expertise of this organization.  They were very professional,  knowledgeable, and cared enough to spend the time to review and teach me the actions I need to take to improve my health now and long term.  The evaluation was thorough and far better than traditional medical care.  Truly focused on prevention using evidence based evaluations and blood tests that are far more accurate and give better direction than the "standard of care".
Longevity Maine is absolutely worth the membership.  The knowledge is priceless and will change the course of your life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJM57DhYqdskwRLuh0hj26YSI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfOEpHVXFRRRAB
reviews.text: Longevity Maine provides a unique health care experience, moving beyond the typical primary care encounter and lab tests to provide a complete, in-depth view of your health. Whereas most medical practices have suggested a change of diet to address my high cholesterol, Dr. Ben went a step further recommending tests that will shed more light than the standard lipid profile and provide a more comprehensive course of care. He also took into account my father's health history and early death to prescribe testing that will help determine my susceptibility to heart disease. Dr. Ben spent more time with me than the standard primary care visit, listening to my health concerns, explaining my health in lay terms and the recommended tests and was transparent about costs. If you're interested in truly preventive medicine, I highly recommend Longevity Maine.

reviews.text: This has been a gamechanger for me. After a session with them I realized my previous trt regiment was very sub optimal. Omar and the doctors go above and beyond to make sure it works for you in your situation and goals. I travel a lot and they are able to work around my schedule to keep me going even on the road.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3FUvIGfskwRgsIo5PnHx3Q/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkS01GbExOSEJvWlhGT2QyVm9ialJoU1VSNVMzYxAB
reviews.text: Best service! My poc Raj Patel is always in touch and checking in. He makes sure everything flows seamlessly, verifying everything is good in my life, and always offers new information on treatments, protocols etc. He genuinely loves helping. Thank you!

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3FUvIGfskwRgsIo5PnHx3Q/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNINEtlTFB3EAE
reviews.text: Renew vitality has changed my life. With Jason’s guidance and and a great medical staff I lost over 75 pounds in one year. My Energy, physique and  libido  is like I was in my teens. I highly recommend Renew and their team to anyone that wants to change their lifestyle and looks. Thank you Jason for all your encouragement and help.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3FUvIGfskwRgsIo5PnHx3Q/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KZlkwcE1jR3AzWTA1cVIyRlBiSGRsYkZCTGVXYxAB
reviews.text: Raj has done a great job helping me through the entire process. He is also extremely responsive to all of my questions and is extremely knowledgeable.

reviews.name: places/ChIJb3FUvIGfskwRgsIo5PnHx3Q/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNubDlXZHlRRRAB
reviews.text: If you're enduring low testosterone symptoms that compromise your quality of life, you should highly consider contacting Renew Vitality.  I worked with Greg and he helped make the process really easy.  There's no downside to learning if you're in need of TRT, and the upside is restoring the energy and vigor you had in your youth.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqa-Znr3lsUwRz4RxNeGmMvk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25vMFMxbFVSR1F4TlUxVE9YSXpNbDlqTVdWME9YYxAB
reviews.text: Jen is thorough, attentive and knowledgeable In her practice. Every visit she ensures you get quality, compassionate care and that you have understanding for whatever she is advising you on. She truly does take time, even with a steady day, for every visit so you can be reassured you’re getting the best care and know how to help yourself be better. She actually did lab work no one else had done for me. Years I struggled not knowing why things weren’t right for me. She did a complete assessment of me and tooo into account my lifestyle and found out I was critically low in many rates. She made a plan immediately and ensured I knew why I felt like I did and guided me to improving it step by step.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqa-Znr3lsUwRz4RxNeGmMvk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xd2RFMUtWMVV5U1RWaFNFUkxPVTgyUVZNd1pXYxAB
reviews.text: Dr. Jen is extremely knowledgeable, took her time to explain my lab work and how my body is working/not working. She explained the process of repairing my bodies deficits and a realistic time frame. I’m leaving confident in our treatment plan. Would highly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqa-Znr3lsUwRz4RxNeGmMvk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaUVJHTlpaVlYyZEVKSFVsRktURk5GYUdOd2RtYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been seeing Jen for over a year now. She is slowly getting me dialed in to optimal hormone replacement therapy. I’ve learned that it’s a very individualistic process and you can’t expect quick results. You must be patient!  She is very holistic in her approach, considering the whole person, not just the HRT piece. Fees are reasonable and I can use my insurance for some of the meds.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqa-Znr3lsUwRz4RxNeGmMvk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taNWJHdzBjVzlyVFRWUlVqTk5TMk0yUVZkZk4xRRAB
reviews.text: One reason to choose Jen at Rejig Mobile Clinic is her commitment to understanding your individual needs and goals. She took the time to listen attentively, which made me feel valued. Instead of a one-size-fits-all approach, Jen tailored her recommendations to suit my personal circumstances, which is a rarity in today’s fast-paced world.  Jen creates a supportive and encouraging atmosphere that truly fosters success. She addresses not just the physical aspects of wellness but also emphasizes the importance of mental and emotional well-being. This holistic approach made a significant difference in my experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqa-Znr3lsUwRz4RxNeGmMvk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xFeWQwbG5WVTl0TjNOTVR6bEdaV1Z6TlhOQ2JuYxAB
reviews.text: Working with Jennifer on adjusting my hormones has been a pleasure! I’ve seen her both in office and virtually. You can tell she has a lot of knowledge to share and made sure I felt heard with my concerns. One of the best things about her is that she explains that although you might not be “medically deficient” there’s always tweaking to be done to make sure you’re in the optimal range for you. She is great at looking at the whole person and not just throwing meds/supplements at you. Highly recommend
